sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The image shows the player moved DOWN. Let me check the yellow L pixel count.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check yellow L pixel count after DOWN
seg = current_frame.segmentation
yellow_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 10)
print(f"Yellow L pixels (large): {yellow_total}")

# Check all yellow nodes
print("All yellow nodes:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"  id={node['id']} pixels={node['pixels']} boundary={node['boundary']}")

# Check player position
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'B' and node['pixels'] == 40:
        print(f"Player boundary: {node['boundary']}")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n--- Player area (rows 43-56, cols 40-62) ---")
for r in range(43, 56):
    print(f"Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r][40:62]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
